description_long: This wallet features a rectangular form with a structured, semi-rigid body. The main exterior surface is a beige fabric adorned with diagonal dark brown chain-like stripes, bordered by black textured material along the edges. A black wrist strap is attached to one corner, providing convenient carrying or securing options. The wallet is closed with a visible zipper that runs along three sides, suggesting a secure and easily accessible compartment inside. The overall design is modern and practical, with a subtle decorative pattern that adds visual interest. No visible brand logo or signs of wear are present, and the wallet appears well-crafted and clean.
description: Rectangular wallet with beige and black exterior, diagonal chain-like stripes, black border, and a wrist strap. Features a zipper closure and a modern, patterned design.
description_view_0: The wallet is seen from the side, highlighting the black border and the attached wrist strap on the left.
description_view_1: This end view emphasizes the thickness of the wallet and the continuation of the decorative stripes across the surface.
description_view_2: The opposite side shows the zipper running along the edge and the wrist strap looped to the right.
description_view_3: Viewed from the other end, the wrist strap attachment and the full pattern of diagonal stripes are visible.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Diagonal dark brown chain-like stripes on a beige background
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Black wrist strap attached to one corner, likely synthetic material
